session.user:
Run type checking on the erk-dev package and report results:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev && uv run ty check src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/ 2>&1 ```
Report all output including any type errors or success.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking command on the erk-dev package.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking on reserve_pypi_name command

session.assistant:
ty passed: All type checks passed in the reserve_pypi_name command directory.
The type checking command completed successfully with no errors or warnings. The code in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/` passes all type checks.
